name: Weapon Pre-Igniter
description: Weapons are fully charged when jumping into a new beacon.

name: Long-Ranged Scanners
description: Reveals adjacent beacon hazards and ship presence on the sector map.

name: Zoltan Shield
description: Provides a 5-HP super shield that blocks all weapons and boarders until depleted.

name: Engi Med-bot Dispersal
description: Crew slowly heal anywhere on the ship, as long as the Medbay is powered.

name: Stealth Weapons
description: Firing weapons does not reduce your cloaking duration.
